evals.name: layer-hierarchy-definition
evals.prompt: Explain the L0/L1/L2 layer system defined in arch-common. What does each layer represent and what kind of documentation belongs at each level?
expectations: L0 should be defined as project-level documentation
L1 should be defined as module-level documentation
L2 should be defined as component-level documentation
Should explain the parent-child relationship between layers
Should provide concrete file path examples for each layer

evals.name: cross-skill-compatibility
evals.prompt: How does arch-common integrate with arch-search and arch-update skills? Explain the shared configuration points.
expectations: Should explain how arch-common config is used by arch-search
Should explain how arch-common config is used by arch-update
Should identify the shared configuration elements (layer definitions, naming rules)
Should explain why shared config ensures consistent behavior across skills
